data.summary: CCPartialRouter fetches existing /web/*.html with X-CCLoad-Partial, DOMParser extracts main.main-content, and history.pushState preserves URL after successful mount.
Shared initPageBootstrap now registers page runs into CCPageLifecycle and captures listeners/timers/i18n callbacks for cleanup, avoiding per-page broad rewrites.
stats→logs and logs→channels use CCPartialRouter.navigate when available, falling back to window.location.href for no-JS/static behavior.
make web-test requires make www-setup first because www/assets/js/i18n.js is intentionally ignored and copied from web/assets/js/i18n.js.
